root_text.sn22.128:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ āyasmā ca sāriputto āyasmā ca mahākoṭṭhiko bārāṇasiyaṁ viharanti isipatane migadāye …pe…
root_text.sn22.128:1.2: ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā mahākoṭṭhiko āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.128:2.1: “Idhāvuso, sutavā ariyasāvako samudayadhammaṁ rūpaṁ ‘samudayadhammaṁ rūpan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti; vayadhammaṁ rūpaṁ …pe… samudayavayadhammaṁ rūpaṁ ‘samudayavayadhammaṁ rūpan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti;
root_text.sn22.128:2.4: samudayadhamme saṅkhāre … vayadhamme saṅkhāre … samudayavayadhamme saṅkhāre ‘samudayavayadhammā saṅkhārā’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.sn22.128:2.5: Samudayadhammaṁ viññāṇaṁ … vayadhammaṁ viññāṇaṁ … samudayavayadhammaṁ viññāṇaṁ ‘samudayavayadhammaṁ viññāṇan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.

translation_text.sn22.128:1.1: At one time Venerable Sāriputta and Venerable Mahākoṭṭhita were staying near Varanasi, in the deer park at Isipatana. …
translation_text.sn22.128:1.3: “Reverend Sāriputta, they speak of this thing called ‘knowledge’.
translation_text.sn22.128:1.5: And how is a knowledgeable person defined?”
translation_text.sn22.128:2.1: “Reverend, it’s when a learned noble disciple truly understands form, which is liable to originate … liable to fall … liable to originate and fall, as form which is liable to originate and fall.
translation_text.sn22.128:2.5: consciousness, which is liable to originate … liable to fall … liable to originate and fall, as consciousness which is liable to originate and fall.
translation_text.sn22.128:2.7: And this is how a knowledgeable person is defined.”
